query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(TABLE_NAME ORDER BY TABLE_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') as tables FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME != '__drizzle_migrations';
